# Marco Sánchez Sorondo

I build complex, reliable software and AI systems end to end, and ship them to production fast.

Cofounder of Intuitiv AI (https://intuitiv-ai.com), an AI consulting and development firm
with clients across several industries. Researcher and professor of generative AI and
computer vision at Universidad Austral. Computer Science degree from Universidad de Buenos
Aires.

## What I do
- Development: platforms, agents, and multimodal systems end to end.
- Consulting: audits, diagnosis, 30/90/180-day roadmaps, implementation support.
- Research: generative AI, computer vision, agents; applications in healthcare and media analysis.
- Training: I teach teams how AI works and how to automate their day-to-day work
  (Universidad Austral, IAE, in-house programs).

## What I've built
- Intuitiv AI (https://intuitiv-ai.com): AI consulting and development firm I cofounded.
- Clofi (https://clofi.com.ar): training management platform for coaches, gyms, and studios
  (routines, nutrition, progress tracking, payments). Built end to end: web, iOS, and Android.
- Peak Health (https://getpeakhealth.com): shipped doctor-in-the-loop medical agents to production.
- OpuLens (https://opulens.technology): multimodal AI platform, 17 edge nodes on 6 continents.
- Taskue (https://taskue.io): local-first, keyboard-driven to-do list.
- MTSApy: MTSA + PyTorch/TensorFlow integration, built at UBA's Software Engineering Lab.

## How I work
Per project, with defined scope, budget, and deadlines.
